title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: A CS50 tech talk argues that humans remain superior to AI at editing word documents reliably. The core challenge for AI is that .docx files contain complex internal structure and rules, similar to software, requiring trustworthy changes at scale. Treating documents as code rather than text files is necessary for AI to operate reliably on them.
